recentTweets.text: Thanks for following my campaign account! If you’d like updates on my official work in the House, please go follow @RepRileyNY.

I am so honored and humbled to be your next Member of Congress in #NY19. 
Hear my Election Night remarks here ⤵️
https://t.co/Iv8AUm36gb

Around here, we give each other the benefit of the doubt. When we face adversity, we pull together and push through.

We fight for the underdog, the overlooked, and the left-behind.

Those are Upstate New York’s values, and I am going to take them with me to Congress.
We’re hearing reports of lines at polling locations in Ithaca, Binghamton and across the district. If you’re in line, stay in line! Your vote matters this year more than ever.

Marc Molinaro was caught on tape supporting a national abortion ban, and in Congress he’s voted 13 times to restrict a woman’s right to choose. That’s why #NY19 is going to reject him this November.
(H/t jesscraven101 on TikTok) https://t.co/GZDUVoZBeq

Public school teachers deserve a raise.

Politicians don’t.
He thinks we’re too stupid to know that he’s taking credit for funding that he voted to cut by 33%. https://t.co/boZOhCQkeH

If we overturn Citizens United, we can stop unlimited dark money spending in our politics and return power to people, not big corporations.

Who’s in?
I’m Josh Riley, the Democrat running to beat corrupt career politician @marcmolinaro and retake the House so @danielsgoldman can be in the Majority where he belongs. Join us 👇 https://t.co/POJh43vi9l

When we win in #NY-19, we take back the House.

Spread the word.

Here’s how stupid @marcmolinaro thinks we are: 

Two days after this meeting, he voted to *cut* the rail safety budget by over 20%, which would’ve resulted in 30,000 fewer miles of track inspections.

No teacher anywhere in this country should pay a higher tax rate than a Fortune 500 CEO.

It’s that simple.

One person. One vote.

End Citizens United, and let’s restore the foundation of our democracy.

Upstate New York will decide control of the House, and the stakes couldn’t be higher.

Momentum and support are building behind our campaign. Together, we will flip #NY19 and deliver the House majority.

https://t.co/6maCa3FsGK

But… you opposed the bill that created this program.

You called it “wasteful spending,” and you voted to repeal federal investments in manufacturing.

We’re not as dumb as you think we are.
He actually voted to slash Head Start funding and kick thousands of kids out of the program.  He just thinks we’re too dumb to know that.
But…. You voted to cut funding for the 988 Suicide and Crisis Hotline by 18%.

Momentum is on our side. In 2024, we are going to flip #NY19 and deliver the House majority.

More, from @politicony ⤵️ https://t.co/d5AqGzQpV6

Let’s overturn Citizens United and remove dark money from politics.

RT if you’re with me.

.@MarcMolinaro just voted to hand the Speaker’s gavel to Jim Jordan, a radical, anti-choice insurrectionist. 

Worst of all? Molinaro thinks you’re too dumb to know or care. He’s wrong. #NY19 https://t.co/kXmEu9TEIl
I’m the Democrat running against this guy. Join our team 👇
Anyone who played a significant part in trying to overturn the 2020 election should not be in Congress, much less in the Speaker’s chair.
Let me get this right: the House GOP took away Kevin McCarthy’s gavel, but they haven’t taken away George Santos’ seat?
Instead of voting to raise pay for themselves, politicians should vote to raise pay for teachers, nurses, and first responders.
Overturn Citizens United.
Why the hell is George Santos still in Congress?

I refuse to allow my children to grow up in a world where kids being gunned down in school is normal.

I’m running for Congress to stop it. #NY19

End Citizens United.

Codify Roe v. Wade.

Pass the Equal Rights Amendment.

That's why I'm running.

If you’ve been convicted of domestic violence, you should not be allowed to own a firearm. Period.
https://t.co/KTuE1PtZ2g
Corporations shouldn’t be allowed to buy elections or politicians. Overturn Citizens United.

George Santos is still in Congress, collecting a taxpayer-funded paycheck.

Why?

Because Marc Molinaro and GOP Party Bosses are protecting him.

Friends,

Monica and I are overjoyed to welcome Mateo Paul Kohli Riley into the world and into our lives.  Mateo was delivered at 1:45 p.m. on June 27, weighing 7 pounds, 12 ounces and measuring 20 inches. He has giant hands, long legs, and—we can already tell—a very big heart. https://t.co/WlgkCDNZRR

We bail out big banks, give tax breaks for private jets, and subsidize Big Oil.

Don’t tell me we can’t afford hearing aids for seniors and daycare for kids.

Pass the Women’s Health Protection Act.

Restore Roe.

Get politicians the hell out of the OBGYN’s office.

House GOP: “I will burn down the economy unless we cut taxes for billionaires and benefits for veterans.”

Also House GOP: “Let’s raise our own pay!”

My mom recently retired after decades in law enforcement, keeping our community safe.

But now Republicans in Congress want to cut Social Security and Medicare.

I won’t stand for it.  Our seniors deserve better.

In our economy and our politics, the deck has been stacked against working folks. 

I’m running for Congress to change that. #NY19 https://t.co/tu19hEKOi9
Pass the Women’s Health Protection Act and get politicians the hell out of personal healthcare decisions.
If you’re response to kids getting murdered at school is to ban your colleagues from the legislature instead of banning assault weapons, then you’re missing the point.
Don’t tell me we can’t afford Social Security for seniors who need it while you’re giving massive tax cuts to billionaires who don’t.
Let’s cut subsidies for Big Oil instead of cutting Social Security for seniors.

Seriously, though, where did all of @Santos4Congress’ money come from?  

He won’t say. 

The public doesn’t know.

The FEC & DOJ need to find out. 

https://t.co/ICI2SXhzn7

After swearing-in George Santos and other ethically-challenged colleagues, the House GOP’s first vote will be a rules package that guts the Office of Congressional Ethics. 

That’s not coincidental.

It’s intentional.

In the last Congress, Dems were unified in:

✔️ capping the cost of insulin
✔️ fighting climate change
✔️ creating jobs
✔️ defending Democracy
✔️ reducing child poverty

In this Congress, the GOP is (sort of) unified in:

✔️ making George Santos sit alone in the corner

I’m old enough to remember when @kevinomccarthy voted to overturn the results of a free and fair democratic election. 

Shouldn’t that alone disqualify him from being Speaker?

Every single House Republican voted against lowering the cost of prescription drugs. Why? They take money from insurance companies, big pharma, and those who profit from drug sales. 

I’m doing things differently.

The GOP said they’d rip away a woman’s right to make her own healthcare decisions. 

And they did. 

Now they say they’re going to rip away seniors’ right to Social Security. 

I won’t let them.

Republicans have made it clear if they take back the House, they will sunset Social Security and allow the same Wall Street investors who crashed our economy in 2008 to gamble your retirement on the stock market.

Losing isn’t an option.

You don’t know what it’s like growing up in a working-class neighborhood in Upstate New York unless you did. 

#NY19 is my home. 

I’ll fight like hell to protect it.
I trust women to make decisions about their own bodies. My opponent does not. This election is a choice.
Overturn Citizens United and restore integrity in our elections.
Everyone should have the ability to retire with dignity. I’ll never cut a dime from Medicare or Social Security. We must keep the promises we made to our seniors.

The path to holding the House starts right here in #NY19. This is the MOST competitive race in the country. Keeping this seat blue could be the difference in the majority. I’m a 5th generation Upstate Democrat, and I need your support. RT

Women should make decisions about their bodies. 

My opponent thinks the government should have a say.

He’s wrong.
Election Day should be a federal holiday. No one should lose a penny of income to exercise their right to vote.
I believe in an America where women are free to make decisions about their bodies without government intervention. My opponent does not. On November 8th, voters have a choice.

I’ll vote to codify Roe, fight back against bounty programs, and restore reproductive justice.

Marc Molinaro won’t.

Choice is on the ballot. I believe women should make their own healthcare decisions. My opponent thinks the government should have a say. 

He’s wrong (about a lot).

Here’s the bottom line: Far-right Republicans won’t stop with a woman’s right to choose. They’ve made it clear they are coming for marriage equality, Social Security, and Medicare. Losing isn’t an option. Please RT.

Our race is neck and neck.

Forecasters are calling it one of the top races to make or break Dems House majority.

I’m Josh Riley, Democrat, father, and 5th generation Upstate New Yorker. Help me get to 60,000 followers today.

kurdistanMentions.text:
We bail out big banks, give tax breaks for private jets, and subsidize Big Oil.

Don’t tell me we can’t afford hearing aids for seniors and daycare for kids.
Let’s cut subsidies for Big Oil instead of cutting Social Security for seniors.

The top 5 oil companies in the country in the last financial quarter made about $40B in profits, while Upstate families canceled summer trips because they couldn't afford to fill up the gas tank. It's unacceptable, and we have the means to fix it.

assessment.summary: The captured X archive has 3 Kurdistan Lens tweet hits for Josh Riley. The social-media posture reads as kurdistan-adjacent regional signal because the strongest matched frame is Iraq, Syria, PKK/YPG, or regional language rather than explicit KRG language. Top matched terms: Oil / Energy.
assessment.whatItWasLike: When this account mentioned the Kurdish file, the language most often clustered around Iraq, Syria, PKK/YPG, or regional language rather than explicit KRG language. I count 0 direct Kurdistan/Kurdish-region term hits, 1 security-frame hit, 0 supportive or diplomatic hits, 0 humanitarian/minority hits, and 3 energy/economic hits in the exported profile window. The latest matched tweet is dated 2023-05-27T14:45:00Z and should be opened before treating this as a final stance.
assessment.dominantFrame: Iraq, Syria, PKK/YPG, or regional language rather than explicit KRG language

I’ll fight like hell to protect it.

The path to holding the House starts right here in #NY19. This is the MOST competitive race in the country. Keeping this seat blue could be the difference in the majority. I’m a 5th generation Upstate Democrat, and I need your support. RT

Women should make decisions about their bodies. 

My opponent thinks the government should have a say.

He’s wrong.
Election Day should be a federal holiday. No one should lose a penny of income to exercise their right to vote.
I believe in an America where women are free to make decisions about their bodies without government intervention. My opponent does not. On November 8th, voters have a choice.

I’ll vote to codify Roe, fight back against bounty programs, and restore reproductive justice.

Marc Molinaro won’t.

Choice is on the ballot. I believe women should make their own healthcare decisions. My opponent thinks the government should have a say. 

He’s wrong (about a lot).

Here’s the bottom line: Far-right Republicans won’t stop with a woman’s right to choose. They’ve made it clear they are coming for marriage equality, Social Security, and Medicare. Losing isn’t an option. Please RT.

Our race is neck and neck.

Forecasters are calling it one of the top races to make or break Dems House majority.

I’m Josh Riley, Democrat, father, and 5th generation Upstate New Yorker. Help me get to 60,000 followers today.

Molinaro cost taxpayers $80,000 on an SUV for himself. 

He tried to use pandemic relief funds to build luxury boxes at a baseball stadium for his cronies.

He doubled the debt, leaving families with the bill.

Notice a pattern? Molinaro’s in it for himself, not for you.

I’m pro-choice. My opponent isn’t

I don’t take corporate PAC money. My opponent does. 

I am from this district. My opponent isn’t. 

I live in this district. My opponent doesn’t.

The top 5 oil companies in the country in the last financial quarter made about $40B in profits, while Upstate families canceled summer trips because they couldn't afford to fill up the gas tank. It's unacceptable, and we have the means to fix it.
There is no way that wealthy corporations should pay fewer taxes than a teacher at Union-Endicott High School.

I’m Josh Riley, the Democrat running in #NY19. Forecasters are calling our district a toss-up and could decide control of the House.

I currently have 54,000 followers. Can you RT to help us get to 60,000 and win this critical seat?

Women should make decisions about their bodies. 

My opponent thinks the government should have a say.

He’s wrong.
The November election will be a choice; between those who respect our democracy and are willing to fight for it or those who would tear it down for political/personal gain.
I’ll never vote to cut a dime from Medicare or Social Security. It’s that simple.

It’s Tuesday. 

I’m still pro-choice. 

My GOP opponent still isn’t.

We must expand Medicare to cover hearing, dental, and vision. 

We can do it now. 

Close tax loopholes for the super wealthy to pay for it. 

That’s my plan.

.@MarcMolinaro has been in elected office for nearly 30 years. Now, (after losing once), he’s abandoning his own community to run for Congress in a district where he’s never lived. 

We need fewer professional politicians and more public servants.

I am honored to be your Democratic nominee in #NY19.  Upstate New Yorkers have been sold out by professional politicians and special interests. I’m running for Congress to bring change and new leadership. This is a campaign by working families for working families. https://t.co/DNTr1e2eIF
Election Day should be a federal holiday, so working folks don’t have to choose between their paycheck and civic duty.

I challenged Donald Trump’s Muslim Ban in federal court. 

If I’m elected, November 8th will not be a good day for Trump.

I currently have 51,000 followers. Can you RT to help us get to 55,000?

Republicans are getting ready to swamp our district with over $1M in dark money Super PAC ads, and we need a Democrat who can fight back. 

RT to help me spread the message.

$18,000,000,000 

That’s the total profits Exxon Mobil raked in, in just one quarter this year.

The fossil fuel industry doesn’t need another break. 

Working families do.

Please RT this. I’m Josh Riley. I fought Trump & his racist Muslim Ban in federal court. Now I’m running for Congress. We have 46K followers. We need to get to 50k. Please RT & follow my account if you agree we need Democrats with a track record of fighting back.

We can't leave anything up to chance. We must codify Roe v. Wade into federal law and protect access to abortion. 

RT if you agree.

Nine unelected Supreme Court Justices wearing robes and sitting on a bench, 2/3rds of whom are men & 1/3rd of whom were appointed by Donald Trump, have no business dictating what a woman can do with her body.
Raise your hand ✋if you support allowing Medicare to negotiate drug prices.

Today, I announced I am running in #NY19, as currently drawn. This will be one of the most competitive seats on the map in 2022. To hold the House we must win in Upstate New York. 

I have 45,000 followers. Can you help us get to 50,000 today?
We should overturn Citizens United and keep dark money *out* of elections, not welcome it in. Representatives should be chosen by the People, not the special interests.

After law school, I had offers to work on Wall Street. I chose a different path and went to work for low-income kids who needed access to healthcare. Wall Street doesn’t need another vote in Congress. But working families do.

I have 38K followers, can you help me get to 40,000?

When Donald Trump tried to ban refugees, I fought back. 

When cable companies tried to raise rates, I fought back. 

When powerful interests tried to weaken Democracy, I fought back. 

I’ll keep fighting in Congress, but I need your help. 

Can your RT & get us to 40k followers?

I’m Josh Riley, and you’ve seen these tweets. You know what I’m going to ask. But I’m going to ask anyway.

I’m a Democrat running in #NY22. This seat is absolutely critical to a Democratic House Majority, and I know we can win. 

Can you help me get to 40,000 followers today?

I’ll be blunt.

Nine unelected Supreme Court Justices wearing robes and sitting on a bench, two-thirds of whom are men and one-third of whom were appointed by Donald Trump, have no business dictating what a woman can or can't do with her body.

Please RT this. I’m Josh Riley. I fought Trump & his racist Muslim Ban in federal court. Now I’m running for Congress. We have 30K followers. We need to get to 35k. Please RT & follow my account if you agree we need Democrats with a track record of fighting back.

My name is Josh Riley. I’m a Democrat running in  #NY22. I stood up to Donald Trump’s Muslim Ban in Federal court, and I’ve spent my career taking on tough fights for everyday Americans. I have 28,000 followers. Can you help me get to 30,000?
Reminder: the word “liberty” does
Election day should be a Federal holiday. Pass it on.

My name is Josh Riley. I’m a Democrat running in the NEW #NY22. 

I stood up to Donald Trump’s Muslim Ban in Federal court, and I’ve spent my career taking on tough fights for everyday Americans. 

I have 27,000 followers. Can you help me get to 35,000?

After law school, I had offers to work on Wall Street. I chose a different path and went to work for low-income kids who needed access to healthcare. Wall Street doesn’t need another vote in Congress. But working families do.

I have 19K followers, can you help me get to 25,000?
In 2022, Republicans are trying to tax seniors and take school lunches away from children. RT if you’re ready to do everything you can to hold the House.

I served as counsel on a subcommittee in the U.S. Senate Judiciary Committee after SCOTUS gutted the Voting Rights Act. Our team immediately went to work on legislation to restore it.

Will you give this a RT and help us get to 20,000 followers today?

My name is Josh Riley. I’m a Democrat running in the NEW #NY22. I stood up to Donald Trump’s Muslim Ban in federal court, and I’ve spent my career taking on tough fights for everyday Americans. I have 18,000 followers. Can you help me get to 25,000?

I challenged Donald Trump’s Muslim Ban in federal court. 

If I’m elected, November 8th will not be a good day for Trump.

I currently have 11,000 followers. Can you RT to help us get to 15,000 and power this campaign to victory?

My name is Josh Riley. I’m a Democrat running in the NEW #NY22. I stood up to Donald Trump’s Muslim Ban in Federal court, and I’ve spent my career taking on tough fights for everyday Americans. I have 10,000 followers. Can you help me get to 15,000?

I’m Josh Riley, and you’ve seen these tweets. You know what I’m going to ask. But I’m going to ask anyway.

I’m a Democrat running in #NY22. This seat is critical to a Democratic House Majority, and I know we can win. 

Can you help me get to 9,000 followers today?

I'm Josh Riley, the Democrat challenging @ClaudiaTenney in #NY22. Her election was decided by just 109 votes in ‘20. This will be one of the most competitive races on the map in 2022. 

I have 1600 followers. My opponent has 73,000! Can you help me get to 2,000 by RTing?

This morning I announced my campaign for Congress in #NY22. It only took @claudiatenney just 14 minutes to start lying about me. She’s scared because she knows we can win. Join our fight to bring Square Deal values to Washington:    

https://t.co/mq63bkiqsT
My name is Josh Riley. I’m a 5th generation native of Endicott, NY. I’m running for Congress in #NY22 because we need more Upstate New York Square Deal values in Washington. https://t.co/Ko5sIuq9OM
